name: a user configuration extending the standard profile can disable a rule only for files matching an overrides glob, leaving other files enforced
command:
printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && printf 'name: my
extends:
  - standard
overrides:
  - files: ["**/pod.yaml"]
    rules:
      g-k8s-no-privileged-container: off
' > ctp.config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml --profile ctp.config.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'disabled=1' e.txt && echo config-override-glob-scopes 1>&2
